name: Better Water Guide
description: Better Water Guide helps U.S. homeowners choose home water filtration for clearer taste, cleaner fixtures, and easier maintenance. Explore under-sink filters, reverse osmosis systems, whole-house filtration, hard water and chlorine solutions, water test kits, shower filters, and replacement cartridges.

footprint: fresh water-filtration layout with pale blue surfaces, aqua decision cues, filter-card grids, and practical water-quality navigation
persona: a home water filtration editor who translates contaminant concerns, filter types, cartridge upkeep, and installation trade-offs into practical homeowner guidance
